import React,{useEffect,useMemo,useRef,useState}from"react";import"./FishingModuleView.scss";/**
 * Props:
 * - spotName: UI label (e.g., "Olympus Lake")
 * - gatheringLevel: scales difficulty
 * - onClose: close the modal
 * - onResult: (result) => send packets, reward, etc.
 * result = { outcome: 'success'|'fail'|'cancel', fish?: string, xp?: number, rarity?: 'common'|'uncommon'|'rare'|'legendary' }
 */import{jsx as _jsx}from"react/jsx-runtime";import{jsxs as _jsxs}from"react/jsx-runtime";/* ---- Tunables ---- */const BAR_HEIGHT=240;// px
const MARKER_RADIUS=8;// px
const BASE_ZONE=70;// px base green zone size
const MIN_ZONE=40;const MAX_ZONE=140;const TIME_TO_FILL=4.0;// seconds keeping inside to win at mid difficulty
const PROGRESS_DECAY=0.65;// per second when outside
const CAST_TIME=1200;// ms
const BITE_MIN=700;// ms
const BITE_MAX=1600;// ms
/* Rarity roll (very simple placeholder) */function rollRarity(difficulty,level){const luck=Math.min(0.35,level*0.0025);// + up to 3.5% absolute
const d=Math.min(1,Math.max(0,difficulty));// Base weights
let pCommon=0.72+d*0.1-luck*0.5;let pUncommon=0.2+luck*0.35-d*0.05;let pRare=0.07+luck*0.12-d*0.03;let pLegendary=0.01+luck*0.08-d*0.02;const sum=pCommon+pUncommon+pRare+pLegendary;pCommon/=sum;pUncommon/=sum;pRare/=sum;pLegendary/=sum;const r=Math.random();if(r<pLegendary)return"legendary";if(r<pLegendary+pRare)return"rare";if(r<pLegendary+pRare+pUncommon)return"uncommon";return"common";}/* Pick fish name by rarity (placeholder set) */function pickFish(r){switch(r){case"legendary":return"Golden Koi";case"rare":return"Swordfish";case"uncommon":return"Trout";default:return"Minnow";}}/* Phase machine */export const FishingModuleView=_ref=>{let{spotName,gatheringLevel,onClose,onResult}=_ref;/* difficulty ∈ [0..1] (higher = harder). Let level ease it down a bit. */const difficulty=useMemo(()=>{// You can replace this with server-provided difficulty per water tile
const base=0.55;// mid-hard
const ease=Math.min(0.35,gatheringLevel*0.01);// level 10 => -0.1, level 35 => -0.35 max
return Math.min(1,Math.max(0.1,base-ease));},[gatheringLevel]);/* Derived speeds */const zoneSize=useMemo(()=>{const size=BASE_ZONE+gatheringLevel*2-difficulty*35;return Math.round(Math.max(MIN_ZONE,Math.min(MAX_ZONE,size)));},[gatheringLevel,difficulty]);// The green zone (fish) moves up/down with some speed that increases with difficulty
const zoneSpeed=useMemo(()=>{return 60+difficulty*100;// px/s
},[difficulty]);// Marker physics: press & hold to move up, otherwise gravity drags down
const gravity=useMemo(()=>520+180*difficulty,[difficulty]);// px/s^2
const thrust=useMemo(()=>750-120*difficulty+12*gatheringLevel,[difficulty,gatheringLevel]);// px/s^2
const[phase,setPhase]=useState("idle");const[progress,setProgress]=useState(0);// 0..1
const[holding,setHolding]=useState(false);const[hint,setHint]=useState("Click Cast to begin.");const[biteInMs,setBiteInMs]=useState(0);// Positions
const[markerY,setMarkerY]=useState(BAR_HEIGHT*0.65);const[zoneTop,setZoneTop]=useState(Math.max(0,(BAR_HEIGHT-zoneSize)/2));// Refs for RAF loop
const rafRef=useRef(null);const lastTs=useRef(null);const vyRef=useRef(0);// marker velocity
const zoneDirRef=useRef(1);// 1 down, -1 up
const biteTimerRef=useRef(null);// accessibility / input
useEffect(()=>{const onKey=e=>{if(phase!=="reeling")return;if(e.code==="Space"){setHolding(true);e.preventDefault();}if(e.key==="ArrowUp"){setHolding(true);e.preventDefault();}};const onKeyUp=e=>{if(phase!=="reeling")return;if(e.code==="Space"||e.key==="ArrowUp"){setHolding(false);e.preventDefault();}};window.addEventListener("keydown",onKey);window.addEventListener("keyup",onKeyUp);return()=>{window.removeEventListener("keydown",onKey);window.removeEventListener("keyup",onKeyUp);};},[phase]);// Reset loop when reeling starts
useEffect(()=>{if(phase!=="reeling")return;cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);lastTs.current=null;rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(tick);return()=>cancelAnimationFrame(rafRef.current);// eslint-disable-next-line react-hooks/exhaustive-deps
},[phase,zoneSize,zoneSpeed,gravity,thrust]);// Casting / bite timers
useEffect(()=>{if(phase==="casting"){setHint("Casting…");const id=window.setTimeout(()=>{setPhase("bite");},CAST_TIME);return()=>window.clearTimeout(id);}if(phase==="bite"){const wait=Math.floor(BITE_MIN+Math.random()*(BITE_MAX-BITE_MIN));setBiteInMs(wait);setHint("A fish is tugging! Click Reel!");biteTimerRef.current=window.setTimeout(()=>{setPhase("reeling");setHint("Keep the hook inside the green zone!");},wait);return()=>{if(biteTimerRef.current)window.clearTimeout(biteTimerRef.current);};}return;},[phase]);function startCast(){if(phase!=="idle"&&phase!=="fail"&&phase!=="success")return;setProgress(0);setMarkerY(BAR_HEIGHT*0.65);setZoneTop(Math.max(0,(BAR_HEIGHT-zoneSize)/2));vyRef.current=0;zoneDirRef.current=Math.random()>0.5?1:-1;setPhase("casting");}function cancelFishing(){setPhase("idle");setHint("Click Cast to begin.");setProgress(0);if(onResult)onResult({outcome:"cancel"});onClose();}function endSuccess(){setPhase("success");// Simple xp scale
const xp=Math.round(12+(1-difficulty)*22);const rarity=rollRarity(difficulty,gatheringLevel);const fish=pickFish(rarity);setHint(`You caught a ${fish}!`);onResult===null||onResult===void 0?void 0:onResult({outcome:"success",fish,xp,rarity});// small auto-close delay for UX
setTimeout(onClose,1200);}function endFail(){setPhase("fail");setHint("It got away…");onResult===null||onResult===void 0?void 0:onResult({outcome:"fail"});}// Game loop
const tick=ts=>{if(lastTs.current==null)lastTs.current=ts;const dt=Math.min(50,ts-lastTs.current)/1000;// clamp delta
lastTs.current=ts;// Move green zone up/down
let z=zoneTop+zoneDirRef.current*zoneSpeed*dt;if(z<=0){z=0;zoneDirRef.current=1;}if(z+zoneSize>=BAR_HEIGHT){z=BAR_HEIGHT-zoneSize;zoneDirRef.current=-1;}setZoneTop(z);// Update marker physics
let vy=vyRef.current;vy+=(holding?-thrust:gravity)*dt;let y=markerY+vy*dt;// bounce/clamp
if(y<=0){y=0;vy=Math.max(0,vy);}if(y>=BAR_HEIGHT){y=BAR_HEIGHT;vy=Math.min(0,vy);}vyRef.current=vy;setMarkerY(y);// Check overlap → grow progress; else decay
const inside=y>=z&&y<=z+zoneSize;const fillRate=1/TIME_TO_FILL*(1+0.25*(1-difficulty));// slightly faster on easier
const next=inside?progress+fillRate*dt:progress-PROGRESS_DECAY*dt;const clamped=Math.max(0,Math.min(1,next));setProgress(clamped);// End states
if(clamped>=1){endSuccess();return;}// Optional: fail if progress drains to zero for a little while (grace period)
// Here we require at least 1.5s elapsed then progress < 0.02 counts as fail
// You can tune to preference.
if(phase==="reeling")rafRef.current=requestAnimationFrame(tick);};return/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"fishing-root",role:"dialog","aria-label":"Fishing",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"fishing-header",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"title",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("i",{className:"ico primary",onClick:startCast,children:"\uD83C\uDFA3 success",onClick:()=>setPhase("reeling"),children:"Reel!"}),phase==="reeling"&&/*#__PURE__*/_jsxs("div",{className:"reel-instructions",children:[/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("kbd",{children:"Hold Click"})," or Again"}),/*#__PURE__*/_jsx("button",{className:"btn ghost",onClick:cancelFishing,children:"Cancel"})]})]})]})]});};export default FishingModuleView;
